  • Limited Manipulation 2.2% — ~7,600,000 Americans

Examples

Example 1 View on Page
The line height of the paragraph is `normal` which will result in a line height of less than 1.5
Mode: light
<p class="ds-c-usa-banner__header-text">An official website of the United States governmen...</p>
XPath: /p[@class="ds-c-usa-banner__header-text"]
Example 2 View on Page
The line height of the paragraph is `normal` which will result in a line height of less than 1.5
Mode: light
<p class="ds-c-usa-banner__action ds-u-align-items--center ds-u-md-display--none ds-u-display--flex">...</p>
XPath: /p[@class="ds-c-usa-banner__action ds-u-align-items--center ds-u-md-display--none ds-u-display--flex"]
Example 3 View on Page
The line height of the paragraph is `normal` which will result in a line height of less than 1.5
Mode: light
<p>...</p>
XPath: /p
Example 4 View on Page
The line height of the paragraph is `normal` which will result in a line height of less than 1.5
Mode: light
<p class="ds-c-usa-banner__header-text">An official website of the United States governmen...</p>
XPath: /p[@class="ds-c-usa-banner__header-text"]
Example 5 View on Page
The line height of the paragraph is `normal` which will result in a line height of less than 1.5
Mode: light
<p class="ds-c-usa-banner__action ds-u-align-items--center ds-u-md-display--none ds-u-display--flex">...</p>
XPath: /p[@class="ds-c-usa-banner__action ds-u-align-items--center ds-u-md-display--none ds-u-display--flex"]

5 Serious alfa SC 1.3.1 A Visual Cognitive SIA-R42: Elements with an explicit ARIA role have the required parent element #
1 pages affected

Rule Information

Engine: alfa

Roles: Front-End Developer

Blocking: No

WCAG: SC 1.3.1 A

Disabilities affected:
Visual Cognitive

Affected Pages

  • https://cms.gov/ (5 occurrences)

Who Is Affected

  • Without Vision 1.0% — ~3,400,000 Americans
  • Limited Vision 2.4% — ~8,100,000 Americans
  • Limited Language, Cognitive, and Learning Abilities 4.7% — ~15,900,000 Americans

Examples

Example 1 View on Page
The element is not owned by an element of its required context role
Mode: light
<button type="button" id="trigger-tabs-1274162189" aria-expanded="false" class="responsive-tabs__tab-button--mobile ds-u-display--flex" role="tab" aria-controls="tabs-1274162189"> </button>
XPath: /button[@id="trigger-tabs-1274162189"]
Example 2 View on Page
The element is not owned by an element of its required context role
Mode: light
<button type="button" id="trigger-tabs-949090800" aria-expanded="false" class="responsive-tabs__tab-button--mobile ds-u-display--flex" role="tab" aria-controls="tabs-949090800"> </button>
XPath: /button[@id="trigger-tabs-949090800"]
Example 3 View on Page
The element is not owned by an element of its required context role
Mode: light
<button type="button" id="trigger-tabs-251365160" aria-expanded="false" class="responsive-tabs__tab-button--mobile ds-u-display--flex" role="tab" aria-controls="tabs-251365160"> </button>
XPath: /button[@id="trigger-tabs-251365160"]
Example 4 View on Page
The element is not owned by an element of its required context role
Mode: light
<button type="button" id="trigger-tabs-894877984" aria-expanded="false" class="responsive-tabs__tab-button--mobile ds-u-display--flex" role="tab" aria-controls="tabs-894877984"> </button>

Mode: light

5 Moderate alfa Best Practice SIA-R53: Headings follow a logical hierarchy #
4 pages affected

Rule Information

Engine: alfa

Roles: Content Author, UX Designer

Blocking: No

WCAG: Best Practice

Affected Pages

  • https://cms.gov/about-cms/contact/speech-meeting-requests (1 occurrences)
  • https://cms.gov/medicare/medicaid-coordination/about/state-payment-premiums (1 occurrences)
  • https://cms.gov/medicare/audits-compliance/part-a-cost-report (1 occurrences)
  • https://cms.gov/medicaid-chip/medicare-coordination/financial-alignment/managed-fee-for-service-model-mffs (2 occurrences)

Examples

Example 1 View on Page
The heading skips one or more levels
Mode: light
<h3>Requesting CMS Administrator or Deputy Administrat...</h3>
XPath: /h3
Example 2 View on Page
The heading skips one or more levels
Mode: light
<h6>...</h6>
XPath: /h6
Example 3 View on Page
The heading skips one or more levels
Mode: light
<h3>Overview</h3>
XPath: /h3
Example 4 View on Page
The heading skips one or more levels
Mode: light
<h3>State Demonstrations</h3>
XPath: /h3
Example 5 View on Page
The heading skips one or more levels
Mode: light
<h6>...</h6>
XPath: /h6
2 Moderate alfa SIA-R78: Headings of same level have text content between them #
2 pages affected

Rule Information

Engine: alfa

Roles: Front-End Developer

Blocking: No

Affected Pages

  • https://cms.gov/ (1 occurrences)
  • https://cms.gov/training-education/learn/find-tools-to-help-you-help-others/guidelines-for-effective-writing (1 occurrences)

Examples

Example 1 View on Page
There is no content between this heading and the next
Mode: light
<h2 class="responsive-tabs__accordion-heading ds-u-font-size--xl ds-u-margin--0">...</h2>
XPath: /h2[@class="responsive-tabs__accordion-heading ds-u-font-size--xl ds-u-margin--0"]
Example 2 View on Page
There is no content between this heading and the next
Mode: light
<h2>...</h2>
XPath: /h2
2 Moderate alfa SIA-R3: lang attribute has a valid language code #
1 pages affected

Rule Information

Engine: alfa

Roles: Front-End Developer

Blocking: No

Affected Pages

  • https://cms.gov/about-cms/contact/newsroom (2 occurrences)

Examples

Example 1 View on Page
The element does not have a unique ID
Mode: light
<div id="block-cms-evo-newsroom-navigation-3" data-block-plugin-id="system_menu_block:newsroom-navigation" class="block block-system block-system-menu-blocknewsroom-navigation ds-u-display--flex ds-u-lg-align-items--center ds-u-lg-justify-content--between ds-u-lg-flex-direction--row ds-u-flex-direction--column">...</div>
XPath: /div[@id="block-cms-evo-newsroom-navigation-3"]
Example 2 View on Page
The element does not have a unique ID
Mode: light
<h2 id="block-cms-evo-newsroom-navigation-3" data-block-plugin-id="system_menu_block:newsroom-navigation" class="block block-system block-system-menu-blocknewsroom-navigation ds-u-display--flex ds-u-lg-align-items--center ds-u-lg-justify-content--between ds-u-lg-flex-direction--row ds-u-flex-direction--column ds-u-lg-font-size--3xl ds-u-color--white ds-u-margin--0 ds-u-font-weight--semibold">...</h2>
XPath: /h2[@id="block-cms-evo-newsroom-navigation-3"]
1 Serious alfa SC 3.1.1 A Cognitive SIA-R7: lang attributes within the html element have a valid primary language subtag #
1 pages affected

Rule Information

Engine: alfa

Roles: Front-End Developer, Content Author

Blocking: No

WCAG: SC 3.1.1 A

Disabilities affected:
Cognitive

Affected Pages

  • https://cms.gov/data-research/monitoring-programs/improper-payment-measurement-programs/exchange-improper-payment-measurement-eipm/improper-payment-findings (1 occurrences)

Who Is Affected

  • Limited Language, Cognitive, and Learning Abilities 4.7% — ~15,900,000 Americans

Examples

Example 1 View on Page
The `lang` attribute does not have a valid primary language subtag
Mode: light

Rule Information

Engine: alfa

Roles: Content Author, Front-End Developer

Blocking: No

WCAG: Best Practice

Affected Pages

  • https://cms.gov/marketplace/about/health-insurance-marketplace-quality-initiatives (1 occurrences)

Examples

Example 1 View on Page
The heading does not have an accessible name
Mode: light
<h3> </h3>
XPath: /h3

🔧 Most Common Issues (axe)

4 rules
6 Moderate axe heading-order: Ensures heading levels are not skipped (e.g. h1→h3). Inconsistent heading hierarchy makes page structure difficult to navigate for screen reader users. #
5 pages affected

Rule Information

Engine: axe

Roles: Content Author, UX Designer

Blocking: No

Affected Pages

  • https://cms.gov/about-cms/contact/speech-meeting-requests (1 occurrences)
  • https://cms.gov/medicare/medicaid-coordination/about/state-payment-premiums (1 occurrences)
  • https://cms.gov/medicare/physician-fee-schedule/search/overview (1 occurrences)
  • https://cms.gov/medicare/audits-compliance/part-a-cost-report (1 occurrences)
  • https://cms.gov/medicaid-chip/medicare-coordination/financial-alignment/managed-fee-for-service-model-mffs (2 occurrences)

Examples

Example 1 View on Page
Heading levels should only increase by one
Mode: light
<h3>Requesting CMS Administrator or Deputy Administrator</h3>
XPath: .rxbodyfield > h3:nth-child(2)
Example 2 View on Page
Heading levels should only increase by one
Mode: light
<h6>Want regular email updates? Sign up by visiting this&nbsp;<a href="https://public.govdelivery.com/accounts/USCMS/subscriber/new?topic_id=USCMS_7840" data-once="linkMatch">link</a>.</h6>
XPath: h6:nth-child(24)
Example 3 View on Page
Heading levels should only increase by one
Mode: light
<h3 class="field field--name-field-title-title-description field--type-string-long field--label-hidden field__item"> What is the PFS Look-Up Tool? </h3>
XPath: #accordion-1143802727__button > .field--name-field-title-title-description.field--type-string-long.field--label-hidden
Example 4 View on Page
Heading levels should only increase by one
Mode: light
<h3>Overview</h3>
XPath: .rxbodyfield > h3
Example 5 View on Page
Heading levels should only increase by one
Mode: light
<h3>State Demonstrations</h3>
XPath: .rxbodyfield > h3
1 Serious axe SC 3.1.2 AA Cognitive valid-lang: Ensures lang attributes have valid BCP 47 language tag values. Invalid language tags prevent screen readers from switching to the correct pronunciation. #
1 pages affected

Rule Information

Engine: axe

Roles: Content Author, Front-End Developer

Blocking: No

WCAG: SC 3.1.2 AA

Disabilities affected:
Cognitive

Affected Pages

  • https://cms.gov/data-research/monitoring-programs/improper-payment-measurement-programs/exchange-improper-payment-measurement-eipm/improper-payment-findings (1 occurrences)

Who Is Affected

  • Limited Language, Cognitive, and Learning Abilities 4.7% — ~15,900,000 Americans

Examples

Example 1 View on Page
lang attribute must have a valid value
Mode: light
<span lang="X-NONE">[1]</span>
XPath: a[href$="#_ftnref1"] > span[lang="X-NONE"]
1 Moderate axe landmark-unique #
1 pages affected

Rule Information

Engine: axe

Roles: Front-End Developer

Blocking: No

Affected Pages

  • https://cms.gov/about-cms/contact/newsroom (1 occurrences)

Examples

Example 1 View on Page
Landmarks should have a unique role or role/label/title (i.e. accessible name) combination
Mode: light
<span class="views-field views-field-field-topic" role="region" aria-label="Related search topics"> <a href="/newsroom/search?sort_by=search_api_relevance&amp;sort_order=DESC&amp;items_per_page=10&amp;f[0]=topic:33506 " data-once="linkMatch">Administration</a> </span>
XPath: .views-field-field-topic[aria-label="Related search topics"][role="region"]:nth-child(1)
1 Moderate axe empty-heading #
1 pages affected

Engine: axe

Roles: Front-End Developer

Blocking: No

Example 1 View on Page
Headings should not be empty
Mode: light
<h3>&nbsp;</h3>
XPath: h3:nth-child(30)

🔧 Most Common Issues (Equal Access)

26 rules
208 Moderate equalAccess input_label_visible: An input element must have an associated visible label #

Roles: Front-End Developer

Blocking: No

Examples

Example 1 View on Page
The input element does not have an associated visible label
Mode: light
<button aria-controls="block-cmsglobalprimarymenu2" data-once="cms-header-nav" aria-haspopup="true" aria-label="Open Main" aria-expanded="false" class="navbar-toggle navbar-toggle-primary-menu ds-u-lg-display--none mobile" id="js-navbar-toggle">
Example 2 View on Page
The input element does not have an associated visible label
Mode: light
<button data-once="cms-header-search buttonMatch" aria-haspopup="true" aria-label="Open Site Search" aria-expanded="false" class="searchbar-toggle ds-u-lg-display--none" id="js-searchbar-toggle">
Example 3 View on Page
The ‘placeholder’ is the only visible label
Mode: light
<input class="ds-c-field ds-u-margin-bottom--05" placeholder="you@example.com" type="text" name="email" aria-label="Enter your email address:" required="required">
Example 4 View on Page
The input element does not have an associated visible label
Mode: light
<button aria-controls="block-cmsglobalprimarymenu2" data-once="cms-header-nav" aria-haspopup="true" aria-label="Open Main" aria-expanded="false" class="navbar-toggle navbar-toggle-primary-menu ds-u-lg-display--none mobile" id="js-navbar-toggle">
Example 5 View on Page
The input element does not have an associated visible label
Mode: light
<button data-once="cms-header-search buttonMatch" aria-haspopup="true" aria-label="Open Site Search" aria-expanded="false" class="searchbar-toggle ds-u-lg-display--none" id="js-searchbar-toggle">
180 Moderate equalAccess aria_role_redundant: ARIA role is redundant with the native role of the element #
69 pages affected

Engine: equalAccess

Roles: Front-End Developer

Blocking: No

Examples

Example 1 View on Page
The explicitly-assigned ARIA role "banner" is redundant with the implicit role of the element <header>
Mode: light
<header aria-label="Site header" role="banner" class="header" id="header">
Example 2 View on Page
The explicitly-assigned ARIA role "main" is redundant with the implicit role of the element <main>
Mode: light
<main role="main" id="skipNavTarget">
Example 3 View on Page
The explicitly-assigned ARIA role "banner" is redundant with the implicit role of the element <header>
Mode: light
<header aria-label="Site header" role="banner" class="header" id="header">
Example 4 View on Page
The explicitly-assigned ARIA role "main" is redundant with the implicit role of the element <main>
Mode: light
<main role="main" id="skipNavTarget">
Example 5 View on Page
The explicitly-assigned ARIA role "button" is redundant with the implicit role of the element <button>
Mode: light
<button role="button" data-once="heroSitewideInitiatedMatch" class="button js-form-submit form-submit ds-c-button ds-c-button--solid" value="Search" id="edit-submit--1i3_y5q_WK8" type="submit" data-drupal-selector="edit-submit">
140 Moderate equalAccess label_ref_valid #
69 pages affected

Rule Information

Engine: equalAccess

Roles: Front-End Developer

Blocking: No

  • https://cms.gov/digital-service/findsupportgov (2 occurrences)

Examples

Example 1 View on Page
The value "email" of the 'for' attribute is not the 'id' of a valid element
Mode: light
<label class="ds-u-font-weight--bold ds-u-margin-bottom--1 ds-u-margin-top--3" for="email">
Example 2 View on Page
The value "email-footer-submit" of the 'for' attribute is not the 'id' of a valid element
Mode: light
<label class="ds-u-visibility--screen-reader" for="email-footer-submit" id="email-submit-label">
Example 3 View on Page
The value "edit-keys" of the 'for' attribute is not the 'id' of a valid element
Mode: light
<label class="ds-c-label visually-hidden" for="edit-keys">
Example 4 View on Page
The value "email" of the 'for' attribute is not the 'id' of a valid element
Mode: light
<label class="ds-u-font-weight--bold ds-u-margin-bottom--1 ds-u-margin-top--3" for="email">
Example 5 View on Page
The value "email-footer-submit" of the 'for' attribute is not the 'id' of a valid element
Mode: light
<label class="ds-u-visibility--screen-reader" for="email-footer-submit" id="email-submit-label">

Examples

Example 1 View on Page
Confirm that when the element receives focus, it is not covered or, if covered by user action, can be uncovered without moving focus
Mode: light
<a data-once="linkMatch" class="visually-hidden focusable skip-link" href="#skipNavTarget">
Example 2 View on Page
Confirm that when the element receives focus, it is not covered or, if covered by user action, can be uncovered without moving focus
Mode: light
<a data-once="linkMatch" href="http://findsupport.gov">
Example 3 View on Page
Confirm that when the element receives focus, it is not covered or, if covered by user action, can be uncovered without moving focus
Mode: light
<a data-once="linkMatch" class="visually-hidden focusable skip-link" href="#skipNavTarget">
Example 4 View on Page
Confirm that when the element receives focus, it is not covered or, if covered by user action, can be uncovered without moving focus
Mode: light
<button role="button" data-once="heroSitewideInitiatedMatch" class="button js-form-submit form-submit ds-c-button ds-c-button--solid" value="Search" id="edit-submit--1i3_y5q_WK8" type="submit" data-drupal-selector="edit-submit">
Example 5 View on Page
Confirm that when the element receives focus, it is not covered or, if covered by user action, can be uncovered without moving focus
Mode: light
<a data-once="linkMatch" class="visually-hidden focusable skip-link" href="#skipNavTarget">

Examples

Example 1 View on Page
Confirm this text 'Project Timeline: May 2022 - May 2023' is used as a heading and if so, modify to use a heading element or role
Mode: light
<div data-once="trademark-symbol" class="cms-text--prominent field field--name-field-cms-banner-copy field--type-text-long field--label-hidden field__item">
Example 2 View on Page
Confirm this text 'Project Timeline: May 2022 - May 2023' is used as a heading and if so, modify to use a heading element or role
Mode: light
<p>
Example 3 View on Page
Confirm this text 'Linkedin link' is used as a heading and if so, modify to use a heading element or role
Mode: light
<div class="ds-u-visibility--screen-reader">
Example 4 View on Page
Confirm this text 'Rural Health Transformation Program' is used as a heading and if so, modify to use a heading element or role
Mode: light
<div data-once="trademark-symbol" class="field field--name-field-tab-title field--type-string field--label-hidden field__item">
Example 5 View on Page
Confirm this text 'Medicaid Eligibility Made Easy' is used as a heading and if so, modify to use a heading element or role
Mode: light
<div data-once="trademark-symbol" class="ds-c-alert__heading field field--name-field-alert-heading field--type-string field--label-hidden field__item">
76 Moderate equalAccess style_focus_visible: An element's focused state must be visually apparent #
69 pages affected

Rule Information

Engine: equalAccess

Roles: Front-End Developer

Blocking: No

Affected Pages

  • https://cms.gov/digital-service/findsupportgov (1 occurrences)
  • https://cms.gov/ (1 occurrences)

69 Moderate equalAccess style_highcontrast_visible: Elements must be visible in Windows High Contrast mode #
69 pages affected

Rule Information

Engine: equalAccess

Roles: Front-End Developer

Blocking: No

Rule Information

Engine: equalAccess

Roles: Front-End Developer

Blocking: No

Affected Pages

Examples

Mode: light

Example 3 View on Page

Mode: light

Mode: light

Mode: light
<a tabindex="0" data-dt-idx="4" aria-controls="dynamic_list_items_table" class="paginate_button ">

Roles: Front-End Developer

Blocking: No

The ARIA role 'button' is not valid for the element <input>
Mode: light
<input role="button" placeholder="Search for keywords, topics or resources" data-once="autocomplete" autocomplete="off" maxlength="128" value="" name="keys" id="hero-search-input" type="search" data-autocomplete-path="/suggestion/autocomplete" class="form-autocomplete form-search ds-c-field ui-autocomplete-input" data-drupal-selector="edit-keys">
1 Moderate equalAccess element_lang_valid #
1 pages affected

Rule Information

Engine: equalAccess

Roles: Front-End Developer

Blocking: No

Affected Pages

  • https://cms.gov/data-research/monitoring-programs/improper-payment-measurement-programs/exchange-improper-payment-measurement-eipm/improper-payment-findings (1 occurrences)

Examples

Example 1 View on Page
Specified 'lang' attribute does not include a valid primary language
Mode: light
<span lang="X-NONE">
1 Moderate equalAccess frame_src_valid: The src value of the frame must not be empty #
1 pages affected

Roles: Front-End Developer

1 Moderate equalAccess element_attribute_deprecated: Deprecated HTML attributes should not be used #

Engine: equalAccess

Blocking: No

The HTML attribute(s) "type" is deprecated for the <ol> element in HTML 5
Mode: light
<ol type="1">

Rule Information

Engine: equalAccess

Roles: Front-End Developer

Blocking: No

Affected Pages

  • https://cms.gov/about-cms/contact/newsroom (1 occurrences)

Examples

<span aria-label="Related search topics" role="region" class="views-field views-field-field-topic">
1 Moderate equalAccess aria_region_label_unique #
1 pages affected

Rule Information

Engine: accesslint

Roles: Front-End Developer

Blocking: No

Affected Pages

  • https://cms.gov/about-cms/contact/speech-meeting-requests (1 occurrences)

Examples

Example 1 View on Page
Heading level 3 skipped from level 1. Use h2 instead.
Mode: light
<h3>Requesting CMS Administrator or Deputy Administrator</h3>
XPath: div > div > div > h3:nth-of-type(1)
Example 2 View on Page
Heading level 6 skipped from level 2. Use h3 instead.
Mode: light
<h6>Want regular email updates? Sign up by visiting this&nbsp;<a href="https://public.govdelivery.com/accounts/USCMS/subscriber/new?topic_id=USCMS_7840" data-once="linkMatch">link</a>.</h6>
XPath: div > h6:nth-of-type(1)
Example 3 View on Page
Heading level 3 skipped from level 1. Use h2 instead.
Mode: light
<h3 class="field field--name-field-title-title-description field--type-string-long field--label-hidden field__item"> What is the PFS Look-Up Tool? </h3>
XPath: #accordion-1143802727__button > h3
Example 4 View on Page
Heading level 3 skipped from level 1. Use h2 instead.
Mode: light
<h3>Overview</h3>
XPath: div > div > div > h3
Example 5 View on Page
Heading level 3 skipped from level 1. Use h2 instead.
Mode: light
<h3>State Demonstrations</h3>
XPath: div > div > div > h3

Rule Information

Engine: accesslint

Roles: Front-End Developer

Blocking: No

Affected Pages

  • https://cms.gov/ (5 occurrences)

Examples

Example 1 View on Page
Role "tab" must be contained within: tablist.
Mode: light
<button type="button" id="trigger-tabs-1274162189" aria-expanded="false" class="responsive-tabs__tab-button--mobile ds-u-display--flex" role="tab" aria-controls="tabs-1274162189"> </button>

Rule Information

Engine: accesslint

Roles: Front-End Developer

Blocking: No

Affected Pages

Data cell has no associated header. Add th elements with scope, or headers attribute.
Mode: light
<td> <h2><span><span><strong><span>Don’t say:</span></strong></span></span></h2> </td>
XPath: thead > tr > td:nth-of-type(1)
